<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get file children"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/box/{scope}/file/{file_id}/children"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get all children for the provided file, this is things like
attachments for processed emails
